## What problem does this solve?

Describe the problem or limitation you are running into.

## Proposed solution

Describe how you imagine this feature working.

## Alternatives you considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Examples

Links or screenshots of similar features in other tools, if any.

## Additional context

Any other information about this feature request.
